title: [LVI] Extract information from assume operand bundles
author: philnik777
description: This patch teaches LVI to extract information from assume operand bundles. Specifically, it now uses nonnull and dereferenceable information to remove comparisons to null pointers.

comments.author: pcc
comments.body:
There are several UBSan failures relating to null pointers after this change landed, e.g. https://lab.llvm.org/buildbot/#/builders/25/builds/14949

This change looks like the most likely culprit. Can you please take a look?

comments.author: philnik777
comments.body: @pcc #177562 should have fixed this. It looks like there are still UBSan issues, but they seem unrelated.
